title: Skill 12 — Output Schema (12-offre.json)
description: Contract JSON that analyst.py parses directly. Pure JSON output only — zero markdown fences.

confidence_score.description: Output confidence. Format: 'X/10'. Below 7/10 → flag for human review.

unique_mechanism_name.description: Proprietary mechanism name — creates a mental referential only seller owns. Must be original, not generic.

unique_mechanism_description.description: 2-3 sentence explanation of WHY the mechanism works differently than anything else on market.

big_domino_claim.description: The ONE belief that, if collapsed, makes all other objections irrelevant. Extracted from 09.advanced_tactics.big_domino_shift — NOT invented.

core_promise.description: Format: '[Specific Result] in [Precise Time] without [Primary Obstacle from persona]'. Must contain a number, a time unit, and a 'without' clause.

dream_outcome.description: Anchored on verbatims from skill 09 — not invented. The precise transformation the buyer desires.

perceived_probability.description: Three simultaneous levers: guarantee + proximity proof blocks + ICP-matched testimonials.

time_delay.description: First win deliverable in <24 hours. Must specify which module/chapter generates the quick win.

effort_sacrifice.description: What plug-and-play assets reduce friction (templates, scripts, checklists). Specific, not vague.

modules_or_chapters.description: Module/chapter list — first item must be the Quick Win (<24h first value delivery)

type.description: Bonus psychological category — drives bonus hierarchy ordering

justification.description: Why this value is credible (consultant equivalent rate, market comparison)

fast_action_deadline_hours.description: Hours until fast-action bonus expires. Null if not fast-action.

type.description: Guarantee type. Sweet spot for $17-$47: keep-product or better-than-money-back.

duration_days.description: Sweet spot: 60 days. 60 days outperforms 30 days by +23% without increasing refunds.

copy.description: Full guarantee copy — must state duration, conditions, and what customer keeps.

total_perceived_value.description: Sum of all elements perceived values. Must equal sum of lead_magnet + core_offer + all bonuses + guarantee.

price.description: Actual sale price — must match price_point from skill 11.

stack_ratio.description: total_perceived_value / price. MINIMUM 10. Ideal 16.9 for $47. Example: $793 / $47 = 16.9.

price.description: Must be $12-$19. Minimal friction — buyer already committed to spending.

dynamic_variants.description: Dynamic order bump variants by traffic source — 2026 differentiator.

opening_copy.description: Must open with 'Before you close this page...' — exploits buying spree momentum.

placement.description: Always Thank You page — immediate post-purchase, one-click, no card re-entry.

type.description: Never arbitrary discount. Lite version OR payment plan only.

price.description: String to allow payment plan formatting (e.g., '$37/month x 3').

cta_matrix.description: One CTA per LP block. All button texts in FIRST PERSON. Zero generic ('Submit', 'Buy', 'Register').

button_text.description: Format: 'Oui, je veux [Résultat Principal] →'. First person. Outcome-driven.

micro_copy.description: Reassurance line below button. Format: '✓ Accès immédiat · ✓ Garantie X jours · ✓ [Specifique]'

button_text.description: Mechanism curiosity CTA. Format: 'Voir comment [Mécanisme Unique] fonctionne →'
Social proof CTA. Format: 'Rejoindre [N] personnes qui ont [Résultat] →'
PRIMARY CTA — highest conversion priority. Format: 'Oui ! Je veux [Offre Complète] pour seulement $[Prix] →'
Guarantee anchor CTA. Format: 'Essayer sans risque pendant [N] jours →'

scarcity_timeline.description: Phased Bonus Depletion — core product never removed. Only bonuses expire. ZERO fake scarcity.

available_stack.description: All stack elements available on days 1-2 (full launch)

copy.description: Urgency copy for this phase — must reference specific bonus names expiring.

expired.description: Fast-Action Bonus expired. Must not remove core offer.
Bonus 2 also removed. Core + Guarantee always remain.

identity_alignment.description: The product is an identity vehicle, not a feature collection. 3 JTBD dimensions: functional, emotional, social.

desired_identity.description: Who the buyer aspires to BECOME — extracted from skill 09 BAB after-state. Not invented.

rational_alibi.description: Logical justification post-purchase (ROI, time savings, price comparison). Left-brain alibi for right-brain decision.

status_signal.description: What buying this says about the buyer to their social circle. Activates social JTBD dimension.

feel_smart_statement.description: The 'feel smart for buying' message — reduces post-purchase guilt and refund demand.

express_checkout.description: Biometric payment options — 2-click checkout reduces abandonment.

bnpl.description: Buy Now Pay Later — mandatory for price_point > $37. +30-50% AOV impact.

trust_badges.description: Trust signals adjacent to card fields. SSL badge always required.

guarantee_reminder_copy.description: Short guarantee reminder placed at checkout — reduces abandonment at final friction point.

guest_checkout.description: Always true — guest checkout by default prevents 24% of cart abandonment.
